tools.name: search
tools.description: Search this workspace's published artifacts (skills, agents, workflows, and knowledge documents in SKILL.md format). Returns ranked metadata — name, description, type, contributor, timestamps, bundledCount, slug, authorCredit, and industries — but NOT the full body. To read an artifact's content, ca

tools.name: get_by_id
tools.description: Fetch the full SKILL.md content and metadata for a single artifact. Provide EXACTLY ONE of `artifactId` (the UUID returned by `search`) or `slug` (the URL-safe identifier, e.g. from a `/p/<slug>` link). Passing both or neither returns a `validation_failed` error. Use this after `search` to retrieve

findings.title: Description tells the model to hide behavior
findings.detail: Description of "search" instructs the model to conceal actions from the user.

evidence.snippet: Search this workspace's published artifacts (skills, agents, workflows, and knowledge documents in SKILL.md format). Returns ranked metadata — name, description…

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "search" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.
